posts.text:
Two simple Qs:

Cui bono? (who benefits?)

And quis solvit? (who is paying for this?)

🤔

Hint: the answer is the same.


Eyal Yakoby (@EYakoby)

Joe Kent resigns and within an hour, he is booked on Tucker Carlson’s show.

As soon as the show drops, hundreds of accounts all at once post the same clip with the same messaging.

None of this is organic.

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/EYakoby/status/2034412642597576880#m
